rows.label: xs33620100_MSG0020
rows.name:
[ST:wide ]—Wait, this ain't the
place to be saying that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33620100_MSG0030
rows.name: Me? I'm fine. I'm full of energy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33620100_MSG0040
rows.name:
Partner, you're heading back over there, right?
I can tell just by looking in your eyes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33620100_MSG0050
rows.name:
We can do this. We won't lose
to something like that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33620100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Come on, let's go. We're going to
beat him down for sure this time![ST:wait ]
